languages.text: "Обычная... интрижка власть имущих. Если вам нужны будоражащие истории или грязные сплетни, мне нечем вас порадовать". {n}В углах губ Ларии собираются усталые морщинки. Кажется, она не первый раз ведет этот разговор.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Обычная... интрижка власть имущих. Если вам нужны будоражащие истории или грязные сплетни, мне нечем вас порадовать". {n}В углах губ Ларии собираются усталые морщинки. Кажется, она не первый раз ведет этот разговор.{/n}

languages.text: "In the usual way... A dalliance between the powerful. If you want titillating stories or sordid tales, I am afraid I cannot oblige." {n}Tired creases form at the corners of Laria's lips. This is not the first time she has had this conversation, it seems.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Обычная... интрижка власть имущих. Если вам нужны будоражащие истории или грязные сплетни, мне нечем вас порадовать". {n}В углах губ Ларии собираются усталые морщинки. Кажется, она не первый раз ведет этот разговор.{/n}

"In the usual way... A dalliance between the powerful. If you want titillating stories or sordid tales, I am afraid I cannot oblige." {n}Tired creases form at the corners of Laria's lips. This is not the first time she has had this conversation, it seems.{/n}

"In the usual way... A dalliance between the powerful. If you want titillating stories or sordid tales, go ask Camilla Drivestem — gossip runs through that old woman's veins." {n}Tired creases form at the corners of Laria's lips. This is not the first time she has had this conversation, it seems.{/n}

"In the usual way... A dalliance between the powerful. If you want titillating stories or sordid tales, I am afraid I cannot oblige." {n}Tired creases form at the corners of Laria's lips. This is not the first time she has had this conversation, it seems.{/n}

"In the usual way... A dalliance between the powerful. If you want titillating stories or sordid tales, I am afraid I cannot oblige." {n}Tired creases form at the corners of Laria's lips. This is not the first time she has had this conversation, it seems.{/n}

languages.text: “还能是怎么回事……大人物之间的风流韵事罢了。你要是想听那些香艳秘闻，或是龌龊丑事，很抱歉，我并非行家。”{n}菈丽雅的嘴角泛起疲惫的细纹。看来这并不是她头一次经历这类对话。{/n}
languages.original_text: "In the usual way... A dalliance between the powerful. If you want titillating stories or sordid tales, I am afraid I cannot oblige." {n}Tired creases form at the corners of Laria's lips. This is not the first time she has had this conversation, it seems.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “还能是怎么回事……大人物之间的风流韵事罢了。你要是想听那些香艳秘闻，或是龌龊丑事，很抱歉，我并非行家。”{n}菈丽雅的嘴角泛起疲惫的细纹。看来这并不是她头一次经历这类对话。{/n}

languages.text: « De la manière habituelle... Une aventure passagère entre deux puissants personnages. Si vous êtes {mf|friand|friande} d'anecdotes croustillantes et d'histoires scabreuses, j'ai peur de ne rien pouvoir faire pour vous. » {n}Des rides de lassitude se creusent aux coins des lèvres de Laria. Ce n'est pas la première fois que ce sujet revient sur le tapis, semble-t-il.{/n}
languages.original_text: "In the usual way... A dalliance between the powerful. If you want titillating stories or sordid tales, I am afraid I cannot oblige." {n}Tired creases form at the corners of Laria's lips. This is not the first time she has had this conversation, it seems.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « De la manière habituelle... Une aventure passagère entre deux puissants personnages. Si vous êtes {mf|friand|friande} d'anecdotes croustillantes et d'histoires scabreuses, j'ai peur de ne rien pouvoir faire pour vous. » {n}Des rides de lassitude se creusent aux coins des lèvres de Laria. Ce n'est pas la première fois que ce sujet revient sur le tapis, semble-t-il.{/n}

languages.text: "Herkesin alışık olduğu şekilde... Kudret sahipleri arasında yaşanan bir kaçamak. Baş döndürücü hikâyeler veya müstehcen şeyler duymak istiyorsan korkarım yardımcı olamayacağım." {n}Laria'nın dudaklarının kenarlarında yorgunluğu dile getiren kırışıklıklar beliriyor. Anlaşılan bu konuşmayı defalarca yapmış.{/n}
languages.original_text: "In the usual way... A dalliance between the powerful. If you want titillating stories or sordid tales, I am afraid I cannot oblige." {n}Tired creases form at the corners of Laria's lips. This is not the first time she has had this conversation, it seems.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Herkesin alışık olduğu şekilde... Kudret sahipleri arasında yaşanan bir kaçamak. Baş döndürücü hikâyeler veya müstehcen şeyler duymak istiyorsan korkarım yardımcı olamayacağım." {n}Laria'nın dudaklarının kenarlarında yorgunluğu dile getiren kırışıklıklar beliriyor. Anlaşılan bu konuşmayı defalarca yapmış.{/n}

languages.text: «De la forma habitual... el resultado del coqueteo entre los poderosos. Si busca historias excitantes y sórdidas, está preguntando a la persona equivocada». {n}Unas arrugas de cansancio se forman en las comisuras de los labios de Laria. Parece que no es la primera vez que tiene esta conversación.{/n}
languages.original_text: "In the usual way... A dalliance between the powerful. If you want titillating stories or sordid tales, I am afraid I cannot oblige." {n}Tired creases form at the corners of Laria's lips. This is not the first time she has had this conversation, it seems.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «De la forma habitual... el resultado del coqueteo entre los poderosos. Si busca historias excitantes y sórdidas, está preguntando a la persona equivocada». {n}Unas arrugas de cansancio se forman en las comisuras de los labios de Laria. Parece que no es la primera vez que tiene esta conversación.{/n}

languages.text: "Auf dem üblichen Weg ... Einer Tändelei zwischen den Mächtigen. Wenn Ihr aufregende Geschichten oder schmutzige Details wollt, kann ich Euch leider nicht dienen." {n}Um Larias Lippen bilden sich müde Falten. Sie führt dieses Gespräch offenbar nicht zum ersten Mal.{/n}
languages.original_text: "In the usual way... A dalliance between the powerful. If you want titillating stories or sordid tales, I am afraid I cannot oblige." {n}Tired creases form at the corners of Laria's lips. This is not the first time she has had this conversation, it seems.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Auf dem üblichen Weg ... Einer Tändelei zwischen den Mächtigen. Wenn Ihr aufregende Geschichten oder schmutzige Details wollt, kann ich Euch leider nicht dienen." {n}Um Larias Lippen bilden sich müde Falten. Sie führt dieses Gespräch offenbar nicht zum ersten Mal.{/n}

languages.text: 「いつものように…権力者たちの駆け引き。刺激的な話や下品な話をお望みなら、残念ながらお応えできません。」{n}ラリアの唇の端には、疲れのしわが見え始める。この会話は、彼女にとって初めての経験ではないようだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: "In the usual way... A dalliance between the powerful. If you want titillating stories or sordid tales, I am afraid I cannot oblige." {n}Tired creases form at the corners of Laria's lips. This is not the first time she has had this conversation, it seems.{/n}
